title: Riptide sidecar
description: Viewer state persisted next to a waveform trace. Loaded on start, written on change. `view` is the scriptable, required section; `ui` is optional chrome.

version.description: Sidecar format major version. Riptide ignores sidecars whose version it does not understand.

trace.description: Advisory metadata about the trace this sidecar was authored against. Never gates loading.

id.description: Logical trace name (e.g. the VCD/FST stem).

view.description: Waveform/canvas/time state. The portion a CI/script writes.

time.description: Visible tick window and cursor. Zoom is derived from (end - start) over the canvas width.

start.description: Left edge of the visible window, in ticks.

end.description: Right edge of the visible window, in ticks.

signals.description: Active signals in render order. Array index == row; row indices are never stored. Each entry is resolved by `path` against the loaded hierarchy; unresolved paths are skipped with a warning.

ui.description: Trivial UI chrome. Optional — omitted sections fall back to defaults. A script normally omits this entirely.

expanded.description: Scope paths whose tree node is expanded.

snapCursor.description: Snap the cursor to clock edges.

clockAnchor.description: Ruler counts clock cycles instead of nanoseconds.

path.description: Dotted hierarchical path, e.g. "top.dut.fifo.count[7:0]". The stable, run-portable key. For user-derived signals use "derived.<name>".

role.description: Semantic role used for styling and ruler behavior.

derived.description: Marks a user-derived signal and carries its expression.

enumType.description: Reserved: enum table name for value labels. Currently trace-side; not emitted.

gate.description: Reserved: path of a gate signal to mute this row when the gate is not logic-1. Currently trace-side; not emitted.
